description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a gently flared base and rim, giving it an elegant hourglass silhouette. The cup features a prominent handle on one side, ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. On the front, there is a colorful geometric design resembling a stylized prism with rainbow lines, adding a modern artistic touch. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The interior is plain white, matching the exterior base color. There is no visible lid, but the cup is clearly designed to hold liquids, making it suitable for beverages in urban environments such as cafes or offices.
description: A white ceramic cup with a flared shape, ergonomic handle, and a colorful geometric design on the front. The surface is smooth and glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful geometric design and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and the geometric design partially visible on the sides.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and no visible design, showing the cup's plain white surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle visible and only a small part of the geometric design peeking from the right edge.
